flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Hennepin Technical College fell 40% between 2006 and 2009 (44.2% → 26.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Hennepin Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Hennepin Technical College are 13% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($49.5k vs $43.6k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Hennepin Technical College fell 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.9k → $11.4k).
